printed.name: Tower
printed.setup: Lying supine, arms straight and overhead, hands holding poles (close to Mat), legs straight and hip width apart, toes placed on PTBar and plantarflexed

movement.exhale: Roll up onto shoulder girdle / Roll down, return to start position
movement.inhale: Bend and straighten legs / Dorsiflex feet, plantarflex feet

cues: Keep arms straight and maintain scapular stabilization
Anchor sacrum on Mat (as close as possible) in start position
